assessment.note: She pivoted from future direction to a present-state drop in motivation around team rituals, signaling strong growth uncertainty plus mild engagement and wellbeing decline.

new_queue.label: Team rituals dip
new_queue.name: Team rituals feel less motivating lately — what changed for you there?
new_queue.description: Follows the concrete thread to understand what shifted in her day-to-day connection and motivation.

new_queue.label: Tradeoffs ahead
new_queue.name: What would you be willing to trade off to make space for that growth?
new_queue.description: Forces a real investment conversation about time, focus, and priorities.

new_queue.label: Next move
new_queue.name: Where do you want to focus first before we talk again?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific commitment and turns the conversation into an action.
